prompt: A collage style of a beach sunset with palm trees.
prompt_refined: Generate a new image depicting a vivid beach sunset in a stylized graphic art or digital illustration style, inspired by the aesthetic of image 1. Feature a large, bright yellow sun centrally placed above the horizon, casting a strong reflection across the ocean to the left. The sandy beach extends into the right foreground, leading towards a cluster of silhouetted palm trees on the far right. Ensure the image incorporates prominent outlines and the distinctive cracked, fragmented textures seen in image 1 to convey the 'collage' effect.
objects: Large, bright yellow sun centrally placed above the horizon
Strong sun reflection across the ocean to the left
Sandy beach extending into the right foreground
Cluster of silhouetted palm trees on the far right
